basic_details.job_title: IIM Indore Deputy General Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Indore (IIM Indore)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Management Indore (IIM Indore) has officially announced the Deputy General Manager (Career Services) Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published on the official IIM Indore website. Candidates who hold a Postgraduate Degree in Management (MBA/PGDM) or an equivalent qualification from a recognised institution can now submit their online applications up to 13 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in Management (MBA/PGDM) or equivalent qualification from a recognised institution.
qualification.details: Deputy General Manager (Career Services): Postgraduate degree in Management (MBA/PGDM) or equivalent qualification from a recognised institution. Minimum 10 years of relevant experience in industry across sectors or in managing career services/recruitments in reputed academic institutions.

salary_details.pay_scale: Consolidated monthly pay package subject to satisfactory performance, reviewed on an annual basis. Salary will not be a constraint for the deserving candidate.
salary_details.details: Consolidated monthly pay package subject to satisfactory performance, reviewed on an annual basis. Salary will not be a constraint for the deserving candidate.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Indore Deputy General Manager (Career Services) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Indore to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Deputy General Manager (Career Services) post at IIM Indore?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application online is 13th June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Postgraduate degree in Management (MBA/PGDM) or an equivalent qualification from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Deputy General Manager (Career Services) position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Deputy General Manager (Career Services) at IIM Indore.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website of IIM Indore.

faq.question: Q5. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a Deputation job role at IIM Indore.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Deputy General Manager (Career Services) post?
faq.answer: A consolidated monthly pay package will be offered, subject to satisfactory performance and annual review. Salary is not a constraint for deserving candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the required experience for this position?
faq.answer: A minimum of 10 years of relevant experience is required, either in industry across sectors or in managing career services/recruitments in reputed academic institutions.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this post?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.
